name: Minestrone Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Dried white beans, soaked in
1/8 lb Salt pork, cut into small dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the beans in 3 quarts of water for about 60 minutes until tender.
2. In a large pot, heat olive oil and add salt pork, garlic, onions, leek, parsley, and basil. Brown lightly.
3. Add tomato paste mixed with a little water and cook for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the tomatoes, celery, carrots, potatoes, turnip, cabbage, zucchini, remaining water, salt, pepper, and beans.
5. Cook slowly for 45 to 60 minutes until all vegetables are tender.
6. Add macaroni and cook an additional 10 minutes or until the pasta is done.
7. Adjust seasonings as needed and serve hot, garnished with grated Parmesan cheese.
